title: Crispy Tunisian Onion Stir-fry
description: A festive nut-free-friendly dish featuring umami flavors and crispy onion pieces in a quick stir-fry.
instructions: Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced onions and sauté until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to avoid burning.
Push the onions to one side of the pan and add lemon juice to the other side. Allow it to reduce slightly, about 1-2 minutes.
Return the onions to the non-lemon side and toss everything together for a few more seconds to meld the flavors.
Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving hot.
